text.title: Synthetic Users Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: frame-hypothesis
step.action: Select one falsifiable hypothesis; identify decision class (directional vs commitment).

step.name: ground-personas
step.action: Attach ≥3 evidence anchors per persona; reject abstract personas.
step.decision-gate: Block if any persona has <3 anchors.

step.name: generate-responses
step.action: Generate ≥30% adversarial responses; label every row `synthetic: true`.

step.name: validate-output
step.action: Run validate-synthetic-users.py against the output contract.
step.decision-gate: Block report on any validator violation.

step.name: plan-real-followup
step.action: Schedule live-user round with sample size + date; cite plan in report.
